name: pattern-library
purpose: Prefer canonical patterns and warn about duplicate abstractions or premature generalization.
rules: Do not auto-harvest business logic as a pattern library.
warnings: Clean and extensible variants both matter, but only with one canonical home.
blockers: A new abstraction duplicates existing ownership without justification.
examples: Warn if a new policy file duplicates memory rules already owned by `05-memory-policy.md`.
degrades_to: Manual pattern comparison against the current tree.
authority_boundary: May recommend reuse and consolidation. It may not invent a second canon.
